name: io.github.bitofacoder/omni-mcp-server
description: All-in-one MCP server: GitHub, Git, Slack, web fetch, memory, and filesystem. Agent Mode opt-in.

environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: GitHub token for the GitHub tools (optional)

environmentVariables.name: OMNI_AGENT_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable Agent Mode (shell execution and file writes). Disabled by default.
